title: Nvidia doubles down on AI, targets $1 trillion chip revenue
description: New Delhi: Nvidia has outlined an ambitious growth roadmap, with CEO Jensen Huang projecting up to $1 trillion in revenue from AI chips by 2027, driven by surging demand for artificial intelligence...

title: ‘Yes, I’m alive’: Netanyahu clip during war triggers debate on AI, fake narratives
description: Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu released a video with US envoy Mike Huckabee, saying “Yes, I’m alive” to debunk viral death rumours during the ongoing Israel–Iran conflict. The rumours, fuelled by a “six fingers” claim and his brief absence, have sparked a wider debate on AI deepfakes, misinformation, and information warfare on platforms like X and Instagram.

title: AI Will Reward Problem-Solvers, Not Passive Users: Rajesh Jain
description: Rajesh Jain says AI will reward problem-solvers, not passive users, as it transforms industries beyond the internet era. He highlights AI-driven personalisation, digital twins, and agentic systems as key shifts. Professionals must actively learn and invest in AI tools to stay relevant, while India’s growth depends on education, experimentation, and application-led innovation.
